Meet the Founder

The Woman
Behind Body by Arwa

Shorn Arwa is Kenya's beloved content creator, digital entrepreneur and wellness brand founder. She built Body by Arwa from her own transformation journey — determined to create products that actually deliver real results.

From Nairobi to Dubai to London — thousands of women trust Shorn's products every day. Each one is natural, effective and backed by real customer transformations.

"No Excuses. Just Results. That's the Body by Arwa promise."

Simple Process

How It Works

1

Order Your Kit

WhatsApp 0713 123 177 or pay via M-Pesa Paybill 247247 · Account 222443. Walk-in at Rasumal U32.

2

Receive & Unbox

Same/next day in Nairobi, 3–5 days worldwide via DHL. Guided meal plan included inside every kit.

3

Start Your 14 Days

Morning: Fat Flash Coffee + Fat Burner Pills. Evening: Tummy Blast + Detox Tea. Follow the meal plan.

4

See Your Results

Most customers see visible results within 7–14 days. Reduced bloat, suppressed appetite, more energy.

Ready to Transform?
